mean_cn: adj.其他的，另外的；  n.其他（人或物）
mean_en: used to refer to people or things that are additional or different to people or things that have been mentioned or are known about
sentence: No, I don't want to buy apples. I want some other fruit.
sentence_trans: 不，我不想买苹果。我想买点儿其他的水果。
word_etyma: o超过 + ther形容词比较级后缀 → other其他的，另外的
